mod.fireflymc.name: FireflyMC
Adjust the size of the HUD interface, range 0.5~1.0, default 0.5
fireflymc.rules.title: §d§lFireflyMC Server Rules V2.1
fireflymc.rules.confirm: §aI have read and agree to the rules
fireflymc.rules.section1_1: ●Any form of personal attacks, insults, or discriminatory language is prohibited
fireflymc.rules.section1_2: ●Discussion of politically sensitive topics and spreading false information is prohibited
fireflymc.rules.section1_3: ●Posting pornographic, vulgar, violent, or gory content is strictly prohibited
fireflymc.rules.section2_1: ●Each player is limited to 1 main territory (Overworld)
fireflymc.rules.section2_2: ●Territories must not be set to force-load
fireflymc.rules.section2_3: ●Claiming land in dimensions other than Overworld is strictly prohibited
fireflymc.rules.section2_4: ●Maximum range 3x3 chunks (48x48 blocks), no expansion allowed
fireflymc.rules.section2_5: ●Claiming naturally generated structures (villages/temples/strongholds, etc.) within territory is prohibited
fireflymc.rules.section2_6: ●Building outside territory must be at least 1 chunk away from others' buildings
fireflymc.rules.section2_7: ●Important facilities must have coordinates reported to admin team
fireflymc.rules.section3_1: ●Using cheat mods/clients (X-ray, etc.) is strictly prohibited
fireflymc.rules.section3_2: ●Exploiting game bugs for unfair advantage is prohibited
fireflymc.rules.section3_4: ●Public resource points must retain 20% of original resources
fireflymc.rules.section4_3: ●Third violation: Permanent ban with public notice
fireflymc.rules.section4_4: ●Severe malicious violations result in immediate permanent ban
fireflymc.rules.note1: ▷ Territory disputes can request admin arbitration
fireflymc.rules.note2: ▷ Please DM admin team to mark discovered natural structures
fireflymc.rules.note3: ▷ Important item trades recommended to use sign contracts
fireflymc.rules.note4: ▷ Inactive territories (30 days no login) are periodically cleaned up
fireflymc.rules.footer: FireflyMC advocates a friendly and helpful gaming environment. Final interpretation belongs to the admin team.
